# Curious Tails

> AVS licensed pet shop in Balestier, Singapore (licence AS24J00046) selling puppies at published prices from $3,288 all-in: every price includes a 30+ item starter kit worth $500+, free island-wide home delivery with playpen setup, a free first training lesson with an AVS-Accredited Certified Dog Trainer, free boarding after deposit, and a 5-day nurse-back promise. Run hands-on by owners Nelson and Kim, known for honest lifestyle-first breed matching ("we'd rather talk you out of the wrong breed than sell you the wrong dog"). 41 Google reviews, 5.0 rating. Address: 2 Balestier Road #01-701, Singapore 320002. WhatsApp: +65 8220 6408.

## Breeds (from $3,288 all-in)

- [Our puppy breeds](https://curioustails.sg/puppies): all 7 breeds with HDB status flagged
- [Cavapoo](https://curioustails.sg/puppies/cavapoo): HDB-approved; the independent pick for working couples
- [Maltipoo](https://curioustails.sg/puppies/maltipoo): HDB-approved; companion breed, needs daytime company
- [Mini Dachshund](https://curioustails.sg/puppies/mini-dachshund): HDB-approved; independent small hound, back-care briefing included
- [Cockapoo](https://curioustails.sg/puppies/cockapoo): HDB-approved; the family all-rounder for first-time owners
- [Bichonpoo](https://curioustails.sg/puppies/bichonpoo): HDB-approved; low-shedding, needs daytime company
- [Corgi](https://curioustails.sg/puppies/corgi): NOT HDB-approved; private housing only
- [Shiba Inu](https://curioustails.sg/puppies/shiba-inu): NOT HDB-approved; private housing only

## Pricing & What's Included

- [Puppy pricing](https://curioustails.sg/pricing): the published prices from $3,288 all-in, market comparison, deposit-to-homecoming process
- [Starter kit](https://curioustails.sg/starter-kit): the 30+ items across 8 categories, set up at home with a walkthrough
- [Free training lesson](https://curioustails.sg/free-training): first lesson with an AVS-Accredited Certified Dog Trainer, booked into week one
- [Delivery & setup](https://curioustails.sg/delivery): free island-wide delivery, playpen set up before the puppy explores, free boarding until the home is ready

## Guides for first-time owners

- [First-time owner checklist](https://curioustails.sg/first-time-owners): the five decisions in order
- [Breed selector quiz](https://curioustails.sg/first-time-owners/breed-selector): 5-question match with HDB filter
- [HDB-approved breeds](https://curioustails.sg/first-time-owners/hdb-breeds): the rules, the list grouped, Project ADORE
- [First-year budget](https://curioustails.sg/first-time-owners/budget-guide): $1,200–$3,500/year running costs, line by line
- [Puppy care 101](https://curioustails.sg/first-time-owners/puppy-care-101): week-by-week, with Singapore's exact vaccination schedule (weeks 6/8/12, optional 16, home ~week 9, annual booster)

## Buyer protection

- [Learn before you buy](https://curioustails.sg/learn): the 3 checks every Singapore puppy buyer should run
- [Verify a pet shop licence](https://curioustails.sg/learn/verify-license): the 60-second AVS registry check, step by step
- [Smuggled puppies](https://curioustails.sg/learn/smuggled-puppies): four documented cases and the red flags
- [Vaccinations & health](https://curioustails.sg/learn/puppy-health): the exact schedule and how to read a vaccination record

## About

- [Why Curious Tails](https://curioustails.sg/about-us): what AVS licensing enforces, Nelson & Kim's story
- [Blog](https://curioustails.sg/blog): honest advice from real placements
- [Contact](https://curioustails.sg/contact): WhatsApp +65 8220 6408, visit 2 Balestier Road #01-701 (weekdays 12pm–6pm, weekends 10am–6pm)
